summary: Backend API Testing - Iteration 12 COMPLETE. 17/17 tests PASS. All 5 security fixes verified working: FIX 1 (banned user 403), FIX 2 (password reset brute force protection), FIX 3 (account deletion preserves content), FIX 4 (admin endpoints require_admin), FIX 5 (shadowban content filtering).
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ FIX 1: Banned user gets 403 on /api/auth/me - require_auth correctly checks status='banned' and returns 403
✓ FIX 1: Shadowbanned user can still use API normally (silent shadowban) - status='shadowbanned' does NOT block API access
✓ FIX 2: POST /api/auth/forgot-password creates reset token with attempts=0
✓ FIX 2: POST /api/auth/verify-reset-code with wrong code + email increments attempts on active token
✓ FIX 2: After 5 wrong attempts, correct code also returns invalid (token invalidated)
✓ FIX 2: Rate limit 3 requests per email per hour - 4th request returns success but no new token created
✓ FIX 3: DELETE /api/users/me anonymizes frikts (user_name='[deleted user]', user_id='deleted_user')
✓ FIX 3: DELETE /api/users/me anonymizes comments (user_name='[deleted user]', user_id='deleted_user')
✓ FIX 3: DELETE /api/users/me actually deletes user document from DB
✓ FIX 4: Non-admin user gets 403 on GET /api/admin/reports with denied access logged to admin_audit_logs
✓ FIX 4: Admin user can access GET /api/admin/reports successfully
✓ FIX 5: Shadowbanned user's frikt NOT visible in feed for other users
✓ FIX 5: Shadowbanned user CAN see their own frikt in feed
✓ FIX 5: Shadowbanned user's comments hidden from others in GET /api/problems/{id}/comments

success_rate.frontend: N/A (React Native app - backend only testing requested)

seed_data_creation: Test users created with prefix 'test_security_' for each test, cleaned up after each test. No persistent test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 security fixes verified working. Key test scenarios: 1) Banned user gets 403 on auth endpoints, 2) Shadowbanned user can use API but content hidden from others, 3) Password reset brute force protection with 5 attempts max and 3 requests/hour rate limit, 4) Account deletion anonymizes content but deletes user, 5) Admin endpoints require admin role with denied access logging. Frontend is React Native (Expo) - cannot be tested via browser.

features_verified.fix1_banned_user_403: PASS - require_auth returns 403 for banned users
features_verified.fix1_shadowban_api_access: PASS - shadowbanned users can still use API
features_verified.fix2_token_attempts_zero: PASS - forgot-password creates token with attempts=0
features_verified.fix2_wrong_code_increments: PASS - wrong code with email increments attempts
features_verified.fix2_5_attempts_invalidates: PASS - after 5 wrong attempts, token invalidated
features_verified.fix2_rate_limit_3_per_hour: PASS - max 3 reset requests per email per hour
features_verified.fix3_frikt_anonymized: PASS - frikt user_name='[deleted user]' after account deletion
features_verified.fix3_comment_anonymized: PASS - comment user_name='[deleted user]' after account deletion
features_verified.fix3_user_deleted: PASS - user document deleted from DB
features_verified.fix4_non_admin_403: PASS - non-admin gets 403 on admin endpoints
features_verified.fix4_denied_access_logged: PASS - denied access logged to admin_audit_logs
features_verified.fix4_admin_access: PASS - admin can access admin endpoints
features_verified.fix5_shadowban_feed_hidden: PASS - shadowbanned user's frikt hidden from others
features_verified.fix5_shadowban_self_visible: PASS - shadowbanned user can see own content
features_verified.fix5_shadowban_comments_hidden: PASS - shadowbanned user's comments hidden from others

notes: This is a React Native/Expo mobile app. Frontend testing via Playwright is not possible. All 5 security fixes have been verified working through comprehensive backend API tests with direct MongoDB verification.
